{{Quote|Gravity's silhouette remains, but the star and all the planets, disappeared they have. How can this be?|Yoda|<ref name="Episode 2">{{Film|II}}</ref>}}
'''Imoco''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] that was located in the [[Kamino system/Legends|Kamino system]], within [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. It was the eleventh planet out from that [[Star system/Legends|system's]] primary [[Star/Legends|star]].
